pain_point: Manual extraction of financial data from unstructured client documents bottlenecking their tax and accounting services for closely-held businesses.
draft_email: I noticed on your website that Greenwood Ohlund provides highly tailored tax and accounting services to closely-held businesses in the Seattle area. As you manage a diverse portfolio of these business clients, manually extracting data from their varied, unstructured financial documents likely creates a significant workflow bottleneck for your team. Our Universal Document Analysis platform can automatically extract and categorize data from any document type, completely eliminating manual entry so your CPAs can focus on strategic advisory work.
